name: Chicken Braised with Fennel, Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
From "The 5 in 10 Chicken Breast Cookbook."
1. Cut the chicken into 2 1/2-inch pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Cut fennel crosswise into thin slices.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large frying pan. Add chicken and cook over medium-high heat until browned, about 2 minutes on each side. Remove chicken to a plate, leaving the drippings in the pan.
4. Add fennel to the pan along with the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil. Cook, stirring, until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes to the pan along with 1/4 cup water and fennel seeds. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low.
6. Return chicken and any accumulated juices from the plate to the pan. Cover and cook until the chicken is white but still moist, about 5-7 minutes.
